A Self-Custodial Wallet
Designed For All Your Web3 Needs

Buy, store, and send

Manage your tokens wherever
you are with a single app

Transactions explainer

No more confusing messages
Understand the transaction you are signing-on

Manage all your
NFTs in one place

Music, Video, Images and even 3D NFTs are viewable straight from your Braavos wallet

Deposit funds to your wallet

Buy tokens with your credit card or Apple Pay, transfer from your favorite crypto exchange, Ethereum L1, or a different blockchain

Swap tokens at the best rates

Buy your favorite crypto like ETH, DAI and USDC, in a few clicks directly from your wallet

Why Braavos Wallet?

Be safe and protected while enjoying the benefits of crypto
x100 cheaper fees with
Ethereum inherit security

Braavos is the Alternative to Traditional Wallets​

Crypto Wallets

Smart contract based (account abstraction)

Multi call
Hardware Signer

authentication

Keeps self-custody after upgrade

What people are saying about Braavos?

Hryhorii @Hryhori59658740
Cool wallet and really enjoy using it In both testnet and mainnet as well
Dmitriy @dmitriq1205

Great wallet that I use. It has a user-friendly interface; everything is simple and clear. The development team is excellent, and I will continue to support them

Adrian @adrianpdy
Been playing around with the browser plugin, super smooth.
Kayne @Kayne
Braavos wallet is great, I added liquidity and made several swaps with it. It is quite easy to navigate
Olloy @olloy

I just tried it out; the functions are comprehensive, and it runs smoothly. Overall, it’s a great experience, and I fully support it

Chris Enoch @Chris
Exceptionally unique and incredible app, kudos to the team
